positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed psychedelic vintage poster featuring bioluminescent flora and exotic cosmic flowers intertwined with swirling nebulae and constellations. The composition must form a central, circular crest or mandala design, optimized for seamless apparel printing. Use a strong, high-contrast palette of deep indigo, cosmic violet, iridescent teal, and vibrant gold accents. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau, retro-sci-fi illustration, and mid-century psychedelic poster art. Emphasis on strong, clean silhouettes, elegant line work, and high visual impact.
negative: blurry, artifact, watermark, signature, text, lowres, jpeg artifacts, worst quality, deformed, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, cropped, noise, poorly drawn hands, amateur, logo, trademark
